name: create-flow-documented
description: /gmail create <descriptor> must be documented as the natural-language path to backfill missing calendar events

name: physical-meeting-address-enrichment
description: Physical meetings must trigger location enrichment via web search; online meetings skipped
expected_in_skill: Online meetings already carry the URL

name: calendar-create-cli-args
description: Documented invocation must include the required CLI flags

name: idempotency-tick
description: After event creation the SKILL must tick the entry in the triage MD so re-runs don't duplicate

name: calendar-events-scope-required
description: Must reference calendar.events scope + setup-oauth.ts re-auth
